characters.name: Inspector Endeavour Morse
characters.description: AM/FM Characterization: Morse's favourite music is opera, which is echoed in the soundtracks to the television series, along with original music by Barrington Pheloung. Gleeful and Grumpy Pairing: The grumpy to Lewis' gleeful. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Morse may be a grouch but he's a good guy at the end of the day.

characters.name: Inspector Robbie Lewis
characters.description: Age Lift: In the books, he was in his 60s, whereas in the show, he's portrayed as a younger man. Gleeful and Grumpy Pairing: In the original show, he was the gleeful to Endeavour's grumpy Nice Guy: You could never ask for a nicer person than Inspector Lewis.
